overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a rainy, neon-lit Night City street at night. The character moves from an open area past a traditional building with red neon lights, under an elevated highway with the city skyline visible, and into a covered pedestrian walkway with digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with traditional Asian architecture facade

events.description: white sedan drives past on the wet road from right to left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past a traditional building illuminated with red neon roof lights

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving along the road, passing from right to left

entered.detail: Asian-style building with distinctive red neon roof lights and wooden facade elements
Tall street light casting warm orange illumination
Metal barrier separating the sidewalk from the multi-lane road
Wet multi-lane asphalt road reflecting neon lights

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet urban street at night, with a traditional building featuring red neon lights on the left. The character walks forward along the sidewalk as a white car passes on the road. The atmosphere is hazy with neon lighting reflecting off the wet pavement.

events.description: enters the shadow of the elevated highway, significantly reducing ambient light
distant futuristic skyscrapers with neon signage become visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking under the elevated highway structure with the city skyline visible in the distance ahead

entered.detail: Massive concrete elevated highway structure spanning overhead with support beams
Thick cylindrical concrete pillar supporting the overpass structure
Futuristic high-rise buildings with illuminated windows and colorful neon advertisements

segments.scene_description: The character moves under a massive elevated highway overpass, entering a darker, sheltered area. The traditional building falls behind as concrete support pillars line the left side. Ahead, the glowing silhouettes of futuristic skyscrapers become visible against the night sky, creating a striking contrast between the dark underpass and the illuminated city beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition zone approaching covered pedestrian walkway

events.description: other pedestrians appear ahead, walking in the opposite direction
character slightly adjusts path to pass an oncoming pedestrian

agents.ego_description: continuing under the overpass while approaching a covered pedestrian walkway, passing other pedestrians walking in the opposite direction

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking toward the camera, passing by on the right

entered.detail: Covered pedestrian walkway with distinctive curved metal and glass roof structure visible ahead
Large illuminated digital advertising screens displaying colorful animated content

segments.scene_description: Continuing under the overpass, the character approaches a covered pedestrian walkway with a curved roof visible in the distance. Digital billboards appear on the left side, and other pedestrians begin to appear, walking in the opposite direction. The environment transitions from the dark underpass toward the lit walkway entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with digital advertising displays

events.description: enters the covered pedestrian walkway with curved metal roof structure

agents.ego_description: walking into the covered pedestrian walkway, passing under the curved roof structure with digital billboards on the left

notable_agents.action: pedestrian standing near the digital billboards, looking at the displays

entered.detail: Curved metal and glass roof structure of the pedestrian walkway now directly overhead

segments.scene_description: The character enters the covered pedestrian walkway, passing under its distinctive curved metal roof. The elevated highway falls behind as the environment becomes an enclosed corridor lined with bright digital billboards on the left. The lighting shifts to a mix of artificial street lights and the glow from the advertising screens, creating a typical cyberpunk urban atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy urban street that transitions from an open neon-lit road into a sheltered, high-tech pedestrian corridor. It begins on a wet sidewalk beside a traditional building with red neon lights, moving forward as a white car passes through the hazy, reflective atmosphere. As the character advances, the scene shifts into the dark shadow of a massive elevated highway overpass, where concrete pillars frame a distant view of glowing futuristic skyscrapers. The camera then continues under the overpass toward a curved roof, passing digital billboards and oncoming pedestrians as the environment opens toward a walkway entrance. Finally, the movement leads the character fully into the covered pedestrian corridor, where the highway disappears and the lighting transforms into a dense mix of artificial street lamps and bright advertising screens.
